allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add The Vineyard app to monorepo with full bree-ai integration

Integrate The Vineyard as a new tenant application in the bree-ai monorepo:
- Create complete Vite + React + TypeScript setup following monorepo patterns
- Configure brand identity with emerald green color scheme
- Add workspace scripts for dev and build workflows
- Use @bree-ai/core shared components and utilities
- Configure API proxy to Elysia backend on port 9000
- Set up Tailwind CSS with monorepo content paths

The app is now fully integrated with bun, React 19, Elysia, and Eden stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
